name: io.github.snowmead/oxcode
description: PageRank-curated code intelligence for coding agents over an indexed source repository.

environmentVariables.name: OXCODE_NO_AUTO_UPDATE
environmentVariables.description: Set to 1 to disable the binary's startup self-update check (CI, offline, or reproducible environments).

environmentVariables.name: GITHUB_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Optional: used during self-update to avoid unauthenticated GitHub API rate limits.
